diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyperpyrexia is a cardinal and heavily weighted feature on the Burch-Wartofsky scale.
High fever is also consistent with sepsis — non-discriminating on its own, hence the need to co-consider both.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe tachycardia out of proportion to fever, feeling of the heart pounding

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachycardia disproportionate to the degree of fever is a classic pointer away from simple sepsis and toward thyrotoxic crisis.
In sepsis the tachycardia is usually proportionate to the fever; disproportion favours a hyperadrenergic/thyroid cause.
Severe CNS dysfunction is a high-weight Burch-Wartofsky feature and marks a severe storm.

symptoms.symptom_name: Irregularly irregular pulse consistent with new atrial fibrillation

investigation_details.expected_result: Atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Missed new AF with rapid ventricular response, a driver of high-output cardiac failure.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New atrial fibrillation is a recognised cardiovascular manifestation and a weighted Burch-Wartofsky item; it cannot be confirmed by chat, only by ECG.

symptoms.symptom_name: Abrupt cessation of carbimazole and propranolol one month ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Stopping anti-thyroid therapy is a leading precipitant of storm in Graves' disease; a key history that unlocks the diagnosis.
Intercurrent infection is a classic precipitant of thyroid storm.
A source of infection that must be treated in parallel; also the trigger, not merely a competing diagnosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profuse sweating, nausea and watery diarrhoea

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diaphoresis and GI hyperactivity (nausea, diarrhoea) are weighted GI-dysfunction features of thyroid storm and a source of volume loss.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fine resting tremor of the hands

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A fine tremor is a peripheral sign of the adrenergic overdrive of thyrotoxicosis; video-observable in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpable goitre with an audible thyroid bruit

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A goitre with a bruit localises the aetiology to a hyperactive thyroid (Graves'); requires palpation/auscultation, so sealed and unavailable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Undetectable TSH with markedly elevated free T3 and free T4

investigation_details.investigation_name: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3)
investigation_details.expected_result: Suppressed/undetectable TSH with markedly elevated free T4 and free T3
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: No biochemical confirmation of thyrotoxicosis; treatment is nonetheless clinical and must not wait for results.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Biochemical thyrotoxicosis confirms the substrate; storm remains a clinical diagnosis, so treatment begins before results return. Hospital-only test.
Hyperreflexia reflects the neuromuscular overdrive of thyrotoxicosis; clinician-elicited, sealed.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Hyperpyrexia, disproportionate tachyarrhythmia, CNS dysfunction and GI dysfunction together constitute the classic decompensated thyrotoxic crisis constellation.
Abrupt anti-thyroid drug cessation (substrate loss of control) plus an intercurrent infection (acute stressor) is the classic trigger pairing that tips Graves' disease into storm.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirm biochemical thyrotoxicosis; treatment for storm is clinical and must not await results.
Characterise the tachyarrhythmia (new atrial fibrillation with rapid ventricular response) driving cardiac strain.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Septic screen (blood cultures, chest X-ray, FBC/CRP)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Identify and treat the precipitating infection in parallel with treating the storm.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Electrolytes, renal function, glucose and liver function
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assess volume/electrolyte losses from diarrhoea and sweating, and baseline organ function before therapy.
